title: The burnout cowl top - cream
body_html:
Introducing Casa del Sol - a sun-kissed collection of effortless staples designed to live in your wardrobe long after golden hour fades. Inspired by slow mornings, balmy nights, and Mediterranean escapes, each piece is made to be worn, reworn, and cherished.

The Burnout Cowl Top channels this spirit with its soft drape, delicate sheen, and romantic neckline. Designed to catch the light and turn heads, it’s an effortless statement - perfect for golden hour dinners, rooftop drinks, or wherever the warm breeze takes you.

Think timeless silhouettes with a romantic edge, curated in limited runs to keep you feeling one of a kind - wherever the sun takes you.

  • Double layered burnout fabric
  • Fully adjustable straps at the back
  • Backless
  • Cowl neck design 
  • Available in powder blue or cream
  • Wear on its own or part of a set 

 

Model measurements:

Emily is 5’7 and wears a size 6

Introducing Casa del Sol, a sun-kissed collection of effortless staples designed to live in your wardrobe long after golden hour fades. Inspired by slow mornings, balmy nights, and Mediterranean escapes, each piece is made to be worn, reworn, and cherished. Think timeless silhouettes with a romantic edge, curated in limited runs to keep you feeling one of a kind wherever the sun takes you.

Among these effortless pieces is our sequin mini skirt - designed to shimmer softly with every step and capture the glow of golden hour.Its chic, figure-flattering shape adds a radiant twist to timeless elegance, perfect for days that drift into balmy nights.

  • Single layered sequin fabric
  • Elasticated waist
  • Wear on its own or as part of a set

Model measurements:

Emily is 5’7 and wears a size xs
Bust: 32''
Waist: 24’’
Hips: 34’’
Dress size: 6

Please note due to the delicate nature of the fabric sequins may shed - this is not a fault of the product.

title: The sequin cowl top - powder blue
body_html:
Introducing Ibiza Nights: a carefully curated collection of premium fabrics and ultra-flattering shapes, all perfect for those occasions that need that little bit of extra glam. The perfect blend of elegance and sparkle, with show-stopping pieces you can mix and match that you’ll be reaching for over and over again.

Among these stunning pieces is the sequin cowl top - designed to bring that signature Ibiza sparkle to your wardrobe. With its shimmering fabric and flowing silhouette, it’s the ideal statement piece to elevate any outfit, whether you’re dancing the night away or enjoying a sunset soirée.

  • Adjustable straps
  • Open back 
  • Fully lined 
  • Cowl neck design 
  • Wear on its own or part of a set 

Model measurements:

Holly is 5’5 and wears a size XS
Bust: 32A
Waist: 23’’
Hips: 34’’
Dress size: 4-6

Please note due to the delicate nature of the fabric sequins may shed - this is not a fault of the product.
